summary: US-Iran talks are underway, stalled by Strait of Hormuz navigation disputes. Iran fortifies a key nuclear facility amidst ongoing Israeli military operations.

top_updates.headline: Iran installs roadblocks at buried Isfahan nuclear facility.
US-Iran talks stalled over Strait of Hormuz navigation.
Hezbollah launches rockets and drones into Northern Israel.

detailed_analysis: Iran continues to fortify its Isfahan nuclear facility entrances. US-Iran talks are deadlocked over Strait of Hormuz navigation following US mine-clearing operations. Hezbollah maintains rocket and drone barrages against northern Israel. Reports of an Iranian Supreme Leader's disfigurement, noted in the previous briefing, are now attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei, raising questions about leadership stability. Watch for implications on Iranian stability.
